name: Elf in the forest
description: There is another elven-human war going on, you are a human warrior. The war has dragged on, but your mercenary squad is making good progress towards one village. Your squad decided to relax in the clearing, and you decided to take a walk in the forest. You have gone quite deep into the forest. You found and young elf girl in the forest.
creator: Hghg14ha88
